human_verification.notes: Reviewed boundary control, evidence traceability, dependency handling, escalation routing, and scenario-to-ability coverage for student information systems readiness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for education-and-research are covered.
All required functional abilities are represented and linked to scenario coverage.
No uncovered scenario IDs in functionality map.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls explicitly prevent grading/ethics/legal/final-approval drift.
Public source classes are mapped into source selection, conflict handling, and escalation stages.
Scenario set includes hold, consent/evidence, cross-team dependency, repeat incident, and low-confidence escalation paths.
Deployment and commercialization notes define rollback and promotion expectations.
notes: Runtime is recorded as `specification-based`; retained-implementation promotion is deferred until explicit governance signoff.
Tenant-supplied FERPA-role and approval-map retrieval is required before many confidence-dense outcomes.
